description:
The openssh package should be installed. The openssh package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install openssh
rationale:
Without protection of the transmitted information, confidentiality, and
integrity may be compromised because unprotected communications can be
intercepted and either read or altered.
ocil_clause: the openssh package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the openssh package is installed: 
$ rpm -q openssh
title: Install the OpenSSH Client and Server Package
